rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by adding missing annex blocks or fixing syntax errors without changing unrelated architecture
generic_rules: Use only valid AGREE syntax and visible identifiers in repairs
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation annexes
Use AGREE scalar types int, real, and bool for declarations
Remove guarantees that reference invalid implementation-level paths
Use named constants or visible relations for concrete bounds in assumptions and guarantees
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Use eq for helper declarations and assign for implementation-level bindings
Use assume and guarantee for contract clauses
anti_patterns: Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not reference implementation-level paths in component type annexes
Do not use invalid AGREE type names like integer or boolean
